adminView.js:
root.querySelector('[data-buyers]').textContent = runtimeCount('buyers'); const purchases = Array.isArray(data.purchases) ? data.purchases : []; root.querySelector('[data-purchases]').innerHTML = purchases.length ? purchases.slice(0, 5).map(item => '
' + escapeHtml(item.buyerColor || 'buyer') + ' bought ' + escapeHtml(item.productName || data.productName || 'Product') + ' ' + escapeHtml(item.productPrice || data.productPrice || '') + '
').join('') : '
No purchases yet
';

peerView.js: root.querySelector('[data-buy]')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const catalog = publicData(payload); send({ type: 'PURCHASE_INTENT', blockInstanceId: payload.instanceId, buyerColor: userColor, data: catalog }); if (catalog.stripeCheckoutUrl) window.open(catalog.stripeCheckoutUrl, '_blank'); });

actions.js: if (data.type === 'PING') { const block = findFirstBlock('store'); if (!block) return; setRuntimePeer(block.instanceId, 'buyers', pid, { color: data.buyerColor || '#ffffff', ts: Date.now() }); send({ type: 'CATALOG', blockInstanceId: block.instanceId, data: publicData(block) }, pid); return; } if (data.type === 'ORDER' || data.type === 'PURCHASE_INTENT') { const block = data.blockInstanceId ? getBlock(data.blockInstanceId) : findFirstBlock('store'); if (!block) return; const purchase = { id: 'purchase-' + Date.now().toString(36), buyerColor: data.buyerColor || data.data?.buyerColor || '#ffffff', productName: block.data?.productName || data.data?.productName || 'Product', productPrice: block.data?.productPrice || data.data?.productPrice || '', details: data.data || {}, created: Date.now() }; await updateBlock(block.instanceId, next => { next.data = next.data || {}; next.data.purchases = [purchase, ...((Array.isArray(next.data.purchases) && next.data.purchases) || [])].slice(0, 20); return next; }); send({ type: 'CONFIRMED', id: purchase.id }, pid); }

setupView.html:
Enter your Fine-Grained Token. We will automatically grab the repository it has access to.

1. Go to GitHub Developer Settings (Fine-grained tokens).

2. Repository access: select only the repository for your site.

3. Repository permissions: Contents should be Read and write.

4. Generate the token and paste it above.
setupView.js: const token = fields.githubToken || ''; if (!token) { alert('Please enter a token first.'); return { stop: true }; } if (!state.detected || state.token !== token) { setSubmitLabel('SCANNING...'); try { const uRes = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user', { headers: { Authorization: 'token ' + token } }); if (!uRes.ok) throw new Error('Token invalid.'); const user = await uRes.json(); const rRes = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user/repos?sort=updated&per_page=100&type=all', { headers: { Authorization: 'token ' + token } }); const repos = await rRes.json(); const repo = Array.isArray(repos) && repos[0] ? repos[0] : null; state.token = token; state.detected = { username: user.login || '', repo: repo?.name || '', branch: repo?.default_branch || 'main' }; root.querySelector('[data-github-user]').value = state.detected.username; root.querySelector('[data-github-repo]').value = state.detected.repo; root.querySelector('[data-github-branch]').value = state.detected.branch; root.querySelector('[data-github-manual]').style.display = 'block'; const result = root.querySelector('[data-github-result]'); result.style.display = 'block'; result.textContent = repo ? 'Detected: ' + state.detected.username + '/' + state.detected.repo + ' (' + state.detected.branch + ')' : 'Token valid. Enter the repository name manually.'; setSubmitLabel('ADD GITHUB BLOCK'); return { stop: true }; } catch (error) { alert('Error: ' + error.message); setSubmitLabel('CONNECT & AUTO-DETECT REPO'); return { stop: true }; } } return { data: { githubToken: await encryptSecret(token), username: root.querySelector('[data-github-user]').value.trim(), repo: root.querySelector('[data-github-repo]').value.trim(), branch: root.querySelector('[data-github-branch]').value.trim() || 'main' } };
